title: senna arnottiana
intro: Senna arnottiana is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, commonly known as the Cape senna or Natal senna, native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, anti-inflammatory, and laxative effects. The health benefits of Senna arnottiana include relief from constipation, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce fever. Senna arnottiana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and it can also be found in herbal supplements and teas.
